name: Texas Cheese Wafers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter, flour, cheddar cheese, and seasonings (cayenne pepper and salt) in a bowl until combined.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls using your hands.
3. Place each ball on a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat.
4. Dip the tines of a fork into a little flour to help create texture.
5. Press the tines of the fork into each ball in a crisscross pattern.
6. Bake for 15 minutes, or until the wafers are lightly browned and crispy.
7. Allow the Texas Cheese Wafers to cool on the cookie sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to airtight containers.
8. Store the prepared wafers in the containers until ready to serve.
